metadata.note: Sample starter content; generate more with dndwright.content.generate.

actions: Bite: +5 to hit, 1 piercing damage
Adhesive Secretion: Target must succeed on a DC 10 Strength save or have speed reduced by 10 feet
traits: Spider Climb: The creature can climb difficult surfaces

actions: Razor Claw: +5 to hit, 6 slashing damage
Pack Tactics: Advantage on attack rolls if an ally is within 5 feet
traits: Frenzy Reflexes: Can take the Disengage action as a bonus action

actions: Sear: +6 to hit, 9 fire damage
Flashblind: Creatures within 10 feet must succeed on a DC 12 Constitution save or be blinded until the end of their next turn
traits: Illumination: Sheds bright light in a 20-foot radius

actions: Slam: +6 to hit, 13 bludgeoning damage
Resonating Pulse: Creatures within 15 feet must succeed on a DC 13 Constitution save or take 7 thunder damage
traits: Immutable Form: Immune to any spell or effect that would alter its form

actions: Spore Lash: +6 to hit, 14 slashing damage plus 7 poison damage
Entangling Growth: Targets within 20 feet must succeed on a DC 14 Strength save or be restrained
traits: Regeneration: Regains 5 hit points at the start of its turn if it is in contact with soil

actions: Bite: +8 to hit, 18 piercing damage
Gravity Well: Targeted creature must succeed on a DC 15 Strength save or be pulled 30 feet toward the Maw
traits: Magic Resistance: Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects

actions: Bite: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., 1 piercing damage.
Phase Shift: The creature turns invisible until the end of its next turn.
traits: Evasion: Takes no damage on successful Dexterity saves.

actions: Pollen Burst: Each creature within 10 ft. must succeed on a DC 12 Constitution saving throw or be poisoned for 1 minute.
Root Lash: +4 to hit, reach 10 ft., 5 bludgeoning damage.
traits: False Appearance: While motionless, it looks like a normal flowering shrub.

actions: Searing Touch: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., 7 fire damage.
Ignite: The Cinder-Husk targets one flammable object and sets it on fire.
traits: Death Burst: When the husk dies, it explodes in a 5 ft. radius for 2d6 fire damage.

actions: Shadow Claw: +5 to hit, reach 10 ft., 12 slashing damage.
Terrifying Gaze: Target must succeed on a DC 13 Wisdom saving throw or be frightened for 1 minute.
traits: Shadow Stealth: Can hide as a bonus action in dim light or darkness.

actions: Slam: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., 18 bludgeoning damage.
Lightning Discharge: Recharge 5-6, 30 ft. line, 24 lightning damage (DC 15 Dex save for half).
traits: Magic Resistance: Advantage on saving throws against spells.

actions: Multiattack: Makes two crystalline claw attacks.
Crystalline Claw: +8 to hit, reach 10 ft., 16 slashing damage.
Prism Pulse: Each creature in 20 ft. radius must succeed on DC 15 Con save or be blinded until end of next turn.
traits: Reflective Carapace: Any spell targeting the weaver has a 25% chance to reflect back at the caster.
